title: Comparable-scale local LoRA evaluation
summary: Main local experiments use Qwen3-14B, Gemma-3-12B, Mistral-Nemo-12B, and Llama-3.1-8B under an identical MemPatch LoRA protocol on a 48GB Apple Silicon node.
table_footnote: Parameter counts differ across rows (8B–14B). We compare revision mechanisms under a fixed training recipe.
